# CWE-353 vulnerable — Missing Support for Integrity Check
lang: go
file: CWE-353-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type SqlxDB struct{}

func (db *SqlxDB) Exec(query string, args ...interface{}) error { return nil }

func IngestTelemetry(c *GinCtx, db *SqlxDB) error {
	body, err := io.ReadAll(c.Request.Body)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return db.Exec("INSERT INTO telemetry (payload) VALUES (?)", string(body))
}
